'''Vivendi Allum''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who was part of a commission assigned to investigate the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Bruck Chun]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]].

{{Char-stub}}
